prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年约第 144 名持续上升至 2026 年约第 87 名，排名提升显著，学校综合实力和认可度稳步增强；2023 年曾因教师不配合核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情；2024 年转为中性/混合，分数线持续上涨引发关注；抖音热度总排名第 32（较热），综合热度约 136.5 万，短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中海；但作为综合性大学，法学、计算机、电子信息等专业招生位次靠前，对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业 2024–2026 年社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校相关招生专业匹配；本省 2026 年考生总数 299000 人，按近年物理类占比约 69% 估算约 20.6 万人，较 2025 年物理类 20.7 万人略降，竞争略有缓解；海南大学位于海南省，属热带海岛地域，对内陆考生有一定地域偏好吸引力；该校在贵州招生占比近年约 2%–4%，属中等外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年大幅扩招（+14.7%）、软科排名持续上升、本省物理类考生略降等因素：扩招效应使位次数字增大（更难进），但学校排名大幅提升和声誉改善会吸引更多优质考生，两者对冲后位次仍略升；预测最低位次约 41600 名，区间 41100–42100 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 27184→37633→41302→44958→38086, showing an overall backward trend. From 2022 to 2024, the ranking numbers increased for three consecutive years (intensified competition). In 2025, it rebounded to 38086, an improvement of about 6872 places compared to 2024. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 38086. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for science/physics category was 206 in 2021, 223 in 2022, 228 in 2023, 233 in 2024, and 231 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 265, an increase of about 34 students (+14.7%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from approximately 144th in 2021 to about 87th in 2026, a significant improvement, steadily enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident involving teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing. In 2024, it turned neutral/mixed, with rising admission scores attracting attention. Douyin popularity ranks 32nd overall (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.365 million, indicating mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it performed well. However, as a comprehensive university, majors like law, computer science, and electronic information have higher admission rankings, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation have remained highly popular and recommended from 2024 to 2026, matching the university's relevant enrollment majors. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 299,000, with an estimated 206,000 in the physics category (about 69% of the total), a slight decrease from 207,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, a tropical island region, which has some regional preference appeal for inland candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou has been about 2%–4% in recent years, a moderate scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+14.7%), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the slight decrease in physics category candidates in the province: the expansion effect makes the ranking number larger (harder to enter), but the university's significantly improved ranking and reputation will attract more high-quality candidates, offsetting each other and resulting in a slight increase in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 41,600, with a range of 41,100–42,100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 41,100–42,100, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<41,100), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>42,100), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.
